hero.title: Clube Desportivo Infante Dom Henrique
hero.subtitle: A sports association promoting athletics and youth sports, focusing on running and handball.

about.title: About Us
about.content: Clube Desportivo Infante Dom Henrique is a sports association promoting athletics and youth sports, focusing on road running, trail running, vertical km, skyrunning, track & field, and handball. We encourage sports practice and the development of young talents in our region.
about.subtitle: Founded to foster sports among youth and adults, our club promotes values such as teamwork, resilience, and respect for sport. We regularly compete in regional and national events, excelling in running and handball.

sports.title: Our Sports
sports.subtitle: Discover the diverse sports disciplines we offer and support at our club.
sports.no_posts: No updates available at the moment.
sports.check_back_soon: Check back soon for new news and events.

writing_posts.title: Writing Posts
writing_posts.intro: Guidelines for creating news and sports updates using Markdown files.

guidelines.folder: Location: Place the file in the correct subfolder under src/content/.
guidelines.frontmatter: Metadata: Ensure title, date, image, and description are provided.
guidelines.bilingual: Language: Always provide content in both Portuguese and English.

dos_list.images: Use high-quality images and verify URLs.
dos_list.clear_text: Keep descriptions under 150 characters for best display.

donts_list.formatting: Avoid complex HTML; stick to standard Markdown.
donts_list.huge_files: Do not upload massive images (> 2MB) directly to the repo.
